title: Exposing administration services in containers is security-sensitive
description: Exposing administration services in containers is security-sensitiveAnalyze your codeintentionality-completesecuritySecurity HotspotdockerfilecweExposing administrative services can lead to unauthorized access to pods or escalation of privileges inside pods.A port that is commonly used for administration services is open or marked as being open. Administration services like SSH might contain vulnerabilities, hard-coded credentials, or other security issues that increase the attack surface of a Kubernetes deployment. Even if the ports of the services do not get forwarded to the host system, by default they are reachable from other containers in the same network.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.
